author: Divyesh Thirukonda
name: Gate branch: PR315-derived looped depth
blurb: Structural-depth gate branch forked from PR325's looped transformer design. Uses a PR315-style frontier base with EMA, Partial RoPE, LN Scale, XSA4, and a shared recurrent core. Intended for throughput and geometry testing rather than as the primary submission candidate. Fresh metrics pending.
